articles.title_en: Hanoi Inaugurates Advanced Wastewater Treatment Plant, Bolstering Urban Environment
articles.summary_en: MONRE celebrates Hanoi's new ADB-backed advanced wastewater plant, boosting Red River water quality.

articles.title_en: MONRE Unveils National 2030 Water Sector Strategy, Prioritizing Smart Treatment and PPPs
articles.summary_en: MONRE unveils 2030 Water Sector Strategy: smart wastewater treatment and PPPs are key priorities.

articles.title_en: Mekong Delta Water Resilience: JICA-Backed Treatment Projects Make Significant Headway
articles.summary_en: JICA-funded wastewater projects in Mekong Delta, overseen by MONRE, significantly boost climate resilience.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's EPR Scheme Shows Mixed Results, Eyes 2027 Goals
articles.summary_en: Initial 2026 data on Vietnam's EPR for packaging and electronics shows progress but highlights compliance challenges.

articles.title_en: New Waste-to-Energy Plants Boost Vietnam's Circular Economy by 2026
articles.summary_en: Several large-scale WTE facilities are now online, significantly advancing Vietnam's goal to reduce landfill waste.

articles.title_en: Solid Waste Regulation Enforcement Tightens, Provinces Grapple with Compliance
articles.summary_en: Stricter penalties under Vietnam's 2020 environmental law are being applied, showing varied compliance across provinces.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $750M Loan for Vietnam's Central Highlands Economic Corridor Project
articles.summary_en: ADB greenlights $750M for a new expressway connecting Central Highlands, boosting regional trade & logistics.

articles.title_en: ADB Funds $380M Sustainable Urban Development in Can Tho City
articles.summary_en: $380M loan to Can Tho City for climate-resilient infrastructure, flood control, and public transport.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures $500M ADB Loan for Renewable Energy Grid Modernization
articles.summary_en: ADB provides $500M to upgrade Vietnam's national grid, enhancing integration of large-scale renewable energy.

articles.title_en: Mekong Delta Clean Water Project, Backed by ADB, Celebrates 2026 Completion
articles.summary_en: A major ADB-funded project in Vietnam's Mekong Delta concludes, delivering safe water and sanitation to 2.5 million.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves New Loan for Central Vietnam's Smart Wastewater Infrastructure in 2026
articles.summary_en: New ADB financing targets advanced wastewater treatment and climate resilience for growing cities in Central Vietnam.

articles.title_en: Vietnam and ADB Partner on 2026 Initiative to Enhance Urban Sanitation Standards
articles.summary_en: Collaborative program focuses on upgrading urban sanitation infrastructure and promoting sustainable practices across Vietnamese cities.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE)

articles.title_en: World Bank Funds Major Climate-Resilient Water Project in Vietnam's Mekong Delta
articles.summary_en: A new World Bank-funded project, valued at $350M, launched in 2026 to enhance climate-resilient water supply and sanitation in Vietnam's Mekong Delta, focusing on salinity intrusion and sustainable resource management.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Urban Water Supply Modernization Project Hits Key 2026 Milestones with World Bank Support
articles.summary_en: The World Bank-backed Urban Water Supply Modernization Project achieved significant milestones by mid-2026, extending clean water access and improving infrastructure resilience in several major Vietnamese cities.

articles.title_en: World Bank Commits Further Funding for Vietnam's Green Water and Environmental Climate Solutions by 2026
articles.summary_en: Additional World Bank funding was allocated for 2026 to expand Vietnam's green water solutions, emphasizing ecological restoration, wastewater treatment, and climate change adaptation across vulnerable regions.

articles.title_en: JICA-Funded Ho Chi Minh City Metro Line 1 Nears Full Operation, Easing Urban Congestion
articles.summary_en: Ho Chi Minh City's Metro Line 1, heavily supported by JICA ODA loans, is expected to be fully operational by late 2026, significantly improving urban mobility and reducing traffic congestion in the rapidly growing metropolis.

articles.title_en: JICA Launches New Grant Program for Mekong Delta Climate Resilience in Vietnam
articles.summary_en: JICA announced a new grant package in 2026 to enhance climate change adaptation and disaster risk reduction in Vietnam's Mekong Delta, focusing on sustainable water management and agricultural resilience through environmental infrastructure.

articles.title_en: Vietnam and Japan Discuss JICA's ODA Framework for 2026-2030, Prioritizing Green Growth
articles.summary_en: High-level discussions between Vietnam and Japan are underway to outline JICA's ODA loan and grant priorities for 2026-2030, with a strong emphasis on green infrastructure, digital transformation, and human resource development.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Industrial Parks See Robust FDI Surge in Early 2026
articles.summary_en: Strategic infrastructure and policies fuel significant FDI into Vietnam's industrial parks in early 2026.

articles.title_en: Major Infrastructure Projects Accelerate Industrial Park Connectivity in 2026
articles.summary_en: Critical transport and energy projects enhance Vietnam's industrial park appeal for foreign investors in 2026.
articles.source: Ministry of Planning and Investment (MPI) Report

articles.title_en: Green Industrial Parks Emerge as Key Trend in Vietnam's 2026 FDI Strategy
articles.summary_en: Vietnam prioritizes smart, sustainable industrial parks to attract high-tech, green FDI in 2026.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Celebrates Major Offshore Wind Project Commissioning Under PDP8
articles.summary_en: The 600MW 'Thang Long Wind' offshore farm successfully commissioned, marking a significant milestone for PDP8 renewable targets.

articles.title_en: New Financing Mechanisms Accelerate PDP8 Offshore Wind Pipeline
articles.summary_en: Government introduces innovative blended finance solutions, drawing in billions for new offshore wind projects, boosting 2030 targets.

articles.title_en: PDP8 Focus on Grid-Integrated Solar Sees Rise in Hybrid Projects
articles.summary_en: With 2026 updates to PDP8, Vietnam sees a surge in solar-plus-storage projects, ensuring grid stability amidst rapid solar expansion.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh International Airport Phase 1 Fully Operational, Transforming Regional Air Travel
articles.summary_en: As of early 2026, Long Thanh International Airport's first phase is fully operational, significantly increasing Vietnam's air travel capacity and regional connectivity, alleviating congestion at Tan Son Nhat.

articles.title_en: Ben Luc - Long Thanh Expressway Completes Crucial Link to Southern Economic Hub
articles.summary_en: The Ben Luc - Long Thanh Expressway officially opened in early 2026, dramatically enhancing freight and passenger access to Long Thanh Airport and the wider Southern Key Economic Zone, improving regional logistics.

articles.title_en: HCMC Metro Line 2 Progresses, Calls Intensify for Dedicated Long Thanh Airport Metro Link
articles.summary_en: While HCMC Metro Line 2 sees steady construction progress, experts are renewing calls for feasibility studies on a dedicated metro line connecting Ho Chi Minh City directly to Long Thanh International Airport, addressing long-term transport needs.

articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City Launches Advanced Integrated Operations Center
articles.summary_en: HCMC unveils its state-of-the-art IOC, leveraging AI to optimize urban services and enhance public safety.

articles.title_en: Da Nang Accelerates Smart City Digital Infrastructure with New Data Hub
articles.summary_en: Da Nang invests in robust digital infrastructure, including a new data center, to power its evolving smart city IOC.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Prioritizes Cybersecurity for Smart City IOCs by 2026
articles.summary_en: Government outlines new cybersecurity frameworks to protect integrated operations centers across Vietnam's smart cities.
